title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Go library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a simple API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embedders for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chat, code highlighting, markdown, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs to chat, generate, and manage models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI frontend for Ollama written in Rust, featuring readline, syntax highlighting, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion engine.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server in containers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to a local Ollama model and posts replies.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that connects to Ollama and provides a shareable web interface with session memory.
